# Phase 1 — UI Design Contract

> Visual and interaction contract for frontend phases. Generated by gsd-ui-researcher, verified by gsd-ui-checker.

---

## Phase Classification

**Phase 1 is a backend-only phase.** It produces a NestJS API, Keycloak OIDC auth, RBAC system, Docker Compose environment, and auto-generated Swagger docs. There are no custom frontend screens, React components, or user-facing visual interfaces to implement.

The ROADMAP confirms this: Phase 1 has no `UI hint` marker. The first phase with frontend UI is Phase 4 (Timetable Viewing, Editing & Room Management).

**What this contract covers:** Design system foundation tokens and conventions that will apply to all future phases (4-9) when frontend work begins. These decisions are locked now to prevent re-negotiation later.

**What this contract does NOT cover:** No screens, no component inventory, no interaction flows, no responsive breakpoints. Those belong in the UI-SPEC for Phase 4+.

---

## Design System

| Property | Value | Source |
|----------|-------|--------|
| Tool | shadcn (to be initialized in Phase 4 or earlier frontend scaffolding phase) | CLAUDE.md |
| Preset | not yet initialized -- project has no source code yet | Greenfield project |
| Component library | Radix UI (shadcn default, with Base UI transition monitored) | CLAUDE.md |
| Icon library | Lucide React (shadcn default) | Default |
| Font | Inter (system-fallback stack: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif) | Default |

**Note:** `components.json` does not exist. No `tailwind.config.*`, no `postcss.config.*`, no `src/` directory. The monorepo has not been scaffolded yet -- that is Phase 1's job. shadcn initialization should happen when the first `apps/web` package is created (Phase 4 pre-work or a dedicated frontend scaffolding plan).

---

## Spacing Scale

Declared values (must be multiples of 4):

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| xs | 4px | Icon gaps, inline padding |
| sm | 8px | Compact element spacing, form field internal padding |
| md | 16px | Default element spacing, card padding |
| lg | 24px | Section padding, dialog padding |
| xl | 32px | Layout gaps between major sections |
| 2xl | 48px | Major section breaks, page sidebar width gutters |
| 3xl | 64px | Page-level vertical spacing, hero areas |

Exceptions: Touch targets on mobile must be minimum 44px (WCAG 2.5.5 AAA). This applies from Phase 4 onward when interactive elements are built.

---

## Typography

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage |
|------|------|--------|-------------|-------|
| Body | 14px | 400 (regular) | 1.5 | Default text, table cells, form inputs |
| Label | 14px | 600 (semibold) | 1.4 | Form labels, table headers, metadata, nav items |
| Heading | 20px | 600 (semibold) | 1.2 | Page section headings, card titles, dialog titles |
| Display | 28px | 600 (semibold) | 1.2 | Page titles only (one per view) |

**Rationale:** 14px body is chosen over 16px because school management interfaces are data-dense (timetable grids, class lists, grade tables). 14px provides better information density while remaining readable. German text runs ~30% longer than English, so compact typography prevents layout overflow.

**Constraints:**
- Maximum 2 weights: 400 (regular) and 600 (semibold). No bold (700), no light (300).
- Font family: Inter at all sizes. No secondary font.
- All text in the UI is in German (D-15). API responses and documentation are in English.

---

## Color

| Role | CSS Variable | Hex (light) | Usage |
|------|-------------|-------------|-------|
| Dominant (60%) | `--background` | hsl(0 0% 100%) | Page background, content areas |
| Secondary (30%) | `--card` / `--muted` | hsl(240 5% 96%) | Cards, sidebar, navigation bar, table rows (alternating) |
| Accent (10%) | `--primary` | hsl(221 83% 53%) | See reserved-for list below |
| Destructive | `--destructive` | hsl(0 84% 60%) | Destructive actions only (delete school, remove user, revoke permission) |

**Accent reserved for (exhaustive list -- never used for anything else):**
1. Primary CTA buttons (e.g., "Schule anlegen", "Speichern")
2. Active navigation state (selected sidebar/tab item)
3. Form focus rings
4. Links (inline text links)
5. Toggle/switch active state

**Additional semantic colors (used sparingly):**
| Role | CSS Variable | Hex | Usage |
|------|-------------|-----|-------|
| Success | `--success` | hsl(142 71% 45%) | Success toasts, validation passed indicators |
| Warning | `--warning` | hsl(38 92% 50%) | Warning banners, approaching limits |

**Dark mode:** Deferred. Not in scope for v1. CSS variables are structured to support it later via HSL manipulation.

**Accessibility:** All text must meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratio (4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text/UI components). The chosen blue accent on white background exceeds 4.5:1.

---

## Copywriting Contract

All user-facing copy is in German (D-15). Error responses from the API use RFC 9457 Problem Details (D-12) with German `detail` fields.

| Element | Copy | Context |
|---------|------|---------|
| Primary CTA | "Schule anlegen" | School profile creation (FOUND-01) -- the only admin-facing write action in Phase 1 |
| Empty state heading | "Noch keine Schule angelegt" | Shown when no school profile exists yet |
| Empty state body | "Legen Sie Ihre Schule an, um mit der Konfiguration zu beginnen." | Directs the admin to the CTA |
| Error: Auth failed | "Authentifizierung fehlgeschlagen. Bitte melden Sie sich erneut an." | Keycloak token invalid/expired |
| Error: Forbidden | "Zugriff verweigert. Sie haben keine Berechtigung fuer diese Aktion." | RBAC/ACL check failed (AUTH-02, AUTH-03) |
| Error: Validation | "Eingabefehler: {field_detail}" | RFC 9457 with German detail per field |
| Error: Server | "Ein unerwarteter Fehler ist aufgetreten. Bitte versuchen Sie es spaeter erneut." | 500 errors |
| Error: Not found | "Die angeforderte Ressource wurde nicht gefunden." | 404 |
| Destructive: Delete school | "Schule loeschen": "Sind Sie sicher? Alle Daten dieser Schule werden unwiderruflich geloescht. Geben Sie den Schulnamen zur Bestaetigung ein." | Type-to-confirm pattern for irreversible deletion |
| Audit trail empty | "Keine Eintraege im Protokoll" | Audit log view has no entries for the filter |
| Audit trail body | "Aendern Sie den Zeitraum oder die Filter, um Eintraege anzuzeigen." | Guides admin to adjust filters |

**Copywriting conventions (apply to all phases):**
- Formal "Sie" address (not informal "du") -- standard in Austrian school administration
- No exclamation marks in error messages
- Error messages always include a next-step action
- Button labels use imperative verb + noun: "Schule anlegen", "Aenderungen speichern", "Benutzer hinzufuegen"
- Confirmation dialogs for destructive actions always state the consequence explicitly

---

## Registry Safety

| Registry | Blocks Used | Safety Gate |
|----------|-------------|-------------|
| shadcn official | none yet (Phase 1 is backend-only) | not required |

**No third-party registries declared.** Registry vetting will be performed when components are first added in Phase 4.

**Anticipated shadcn components for Phase 4+ (informational only, not contracted):**
- Button, Input, Select, Dialog, Toast, Table, Card, Badge, Sidebar, Tabs, Form, Dropdown Menu

---

## Swagger UI Convention (Phase 1 Specific)

Phase 1's only visual interface is the auto-generated Swagger/OpenAPI documentation at `/api/docs`. No custom styling is applied. The default SwaggerUI theme is used as-is.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Swagger endpoint | `/api/docs` |
| Swagger theme | Default (no customization) |
| OAuth2 flow | Authorization Code (Keycloak OIDC) |
| API prefix | `/api/v1/` (D-13) |
